channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo monthly.

item.title: ☕ fish2018/webhtv (631 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: fish2018

📝 Repository: fish2018/webhtv

📄 Descrizione: WebHomeTV 基于FongMi二次开发，增强了 WebHome 自定义首页、App Native SDK、网盘链接检测 和 Nostr推荐首页。 这个项目的核心目标是让 CSP 站点首页可以变成一个真正可开发的网页应用：开发者可以用 HTML/CSS/JavaScript 定制首页，再通过 App 暴露的 Native 能力完成搜索、播放、跨域请求、资源代理、最近观看、网盘检测和状态同步。

⭐ Stelle: 631

🍴 Forks: 189

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-22T07:10:04Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-20T05:38:33Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ OtterMind/Nubase (442 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: OtterMind

📝 Repository: OtterMind/Nubase

📄 Descrizione: 🔥🔥🔥 Turn AI-written code into real apps. Nubase is an open-source, AI-native backend platform for AI Coding, agentic applications, and modern product teams: Memory, Database, Storage, and Auth in one self-hostable service.

⭐ Stelle: 442

🍴 Forks: 39

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: agent ai ai-agents claude-code cli deno memory openclaw opencode pgvector postgresql postgrest rag skill supabase supabase-auth

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-08T08:42:51Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-24T08:27:18Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📄 Descrizione: This repository is a Morphe patch source for TikTok. It continues the work from earlier community TikTok patch sets, including ReVanced, with the patches adapted for Morphe and tested against newer TikTok builds. The current target version is TikTok 43.8.3

item.title: ☕ pengmoubuaixuexi/TAgent (73 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: pengmoubuaixuexi

📝 Repository: pengmoubuaixuexi/TAgent

📄 Descrizione: TAgent 是一个基于 Java 17、Spring Boot、Spring AI 和 DDD 分层构建的 AI Agent 工程实践项目。 它不是只封装一次模型调用，而是覆盖了一次 Agent 请求从接入、路由、运行时装配、规划执行、RAG、记忆、MCP 工具治理、人工审批、执行中干预，到 SSE 流式输出和全链路观测的完整过程。

⭐ Stelle: 73

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: agent springai

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-19T18:07:51Z

item.title: ☕ kuohsuanlo/LazyContainerAgent (38 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: kuohsuanlo

📝 Repository: kuohsuanlo/LazyContainerAgent

📄 Descrizione: Java agent for Paper 1.21.11 that lazily deserializes chest/container items — removes the chunk-load NBT unpack lag from large storage and map-art. Zero data risk (shadow-validated).

⭐ Stelle: 38

🍴 Forks: 4

item.title: ☕ ch060619/online-shop-platform (32 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ch060619

📝 Repository: ch060619/online-shop-platform

📄 Descrizione: 一个前后端分离的在线商城示例项目。后端使用 Spring Boot、MyBatis Plus 和 SQLite/MySQL，前端使用 Vue 3、Vite、Element Plus 和 Axios，实现商品浏览、分页筛选、购物车、下单、订单查询与取消等核心购物流程。

⭐ Stelle: 32

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-09T12:42:53Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-15T14:01:02Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
